blocks.text: Of David. I praise You with all my heart, sing a hymn to You before the divine beings;
I bow toward Your holy temple and praise Your name for Your steadfast love and faithfulness, because You have exalted Your name, Your word, above all.
When I called, You answered me, You inspired me with courage.
All the kings of the earth shall praise You, O Lord, for they have heard the words You spoke.
They shall sing of the ways of the Lord, “Great is the majesty of the Lord!”
High though the Lord is, He sees the lowly; lofty, He perceives from afar.
Though I walk among enemies, You preserve me in the face of my foes; You extend Your hand; with Your right hand You deliver me.
The Lord will settle accounts for me. O Lord, Your steadfast love is eternal; do not forsake the work of Your hands.
